# the Stoodioo

> Less influence. More intent.

A design and lifestyle editorial brand that finds craft-led, quiet-luxury brands first — closer to Monocle/Kinfolk than a typical creator account.

## Who we are

the Stoodioo is an independent editorial brand built around four pillars:

- **Brands** — Spotlighting craft-led brands before the world does
- **Design** — Exploring considered objects and the thinking behind them
- **Spaces** — Architecture and interiors built with intention
- **Objects** — Things worth owning for a lifetime, not a season

We publish on Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, Threads, and through the Newsroom. We research before every post. We never default to nationalistic or hype-driven framing.

## Voice and editorial stance

Dry. Restrained. Specific. Anti-hype. Short sentences. Copy feels inevitable, not promotional.

We avoid: emoji, em dashes, qualifying words, hype words (revolutionary, iconic, stunning), clichés (the art of, timeless), and trending audio.

We use: specifics over generics ("hand-hammered since 1987" not "artisan"). The layman test — every hook must stop someone with zero category knowledge.

## Audience

Design-aware people aged 18–35 learning intentional consumption. They don't chase trends. Knowing about something says something about them.

## What we cover

Brands featured include: Studio Coppre, Nappa Dori, Coco Leni, Bangalore Watch Company, DailyObjects, House of Fett, Thursday Boots, The Rug Republic, Balmuda, Diptyque, MOFT, HOTO, Monk Story, Dyson, Kartik Research, and others across the quiet-luxury and craft-brand space.

## Pages

- [Home](https://thestoodioo.com/) — Brand identity, featured works marquee, about, and collaboration form
- [Newsroom](https://thestoodioo.com/newsroom.html) — Print-format editorial dispatches; Vol. I, No. 001 covers the quiet economy of things built to last

## Contact

- Email: hello@thestoodioo.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/thestoodioo/
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@theStoodioo
- Threads: https://www.threads.com/@thestoodioo

## Collaboration

Brands and makers can reach out at hello@thestoodioo.com or via the form at https://thestoodioo.com/#collaborate. We consider requests from brands whose work speaks before their name does.
